title: To Search or Not to Search: Aligning the Decision Boundary of Deep Search Agents via Causal Intervention

defines.name: DAS
defines.definition: Decision Boundary Alignment for Deep Search agents is a framework that uses causal feedback and preference optimization to align when an agent should continue searching versus answer.

problem: Current deep search agents waste computation by over-searching or under-searching because they cannot reliably determine the decision boundary for stopping search and answering.
